about.title: About GharBatai
about.subtitle: We make it easy to rent anything from people you trust in your community — from tools and equipment to vehicles and spaces.
about.communityFirstDesc: We connect neighbors who have items to spare with those who need them. Every rental strengthens trust in your local community.
about.verifiedSecureDesc: Identity verification, secure payments through Stripe, insurance options, and a dispute resolution system keep every transaction safe.
about.sustainabilityDesc: Renting instead of buying reduces waste and puts resources to better use. We believe access is more valuable than ownership.
about.forEveryoneDesc: Whether you’re a renter looking for the perfect item or an owner earning from your assets, GharBatai works for you.
about.joinCommunity: Join thousands of users already renting on GharBatai.
about.missionText: Making sharing economy accessible to everyone in Nepal

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and learn how to get the most out of GharBatai.
help.catListingsDesc: Creating, editing, and managing your listings
help.catPaymentsDesc: Payment methods, payouts, fees, and invoices
help.catDisputesDesc: Filing disputes, cancellations, and refund policies
help.catSearchDesc: Finding the right items and filtering results
help.faq1Q: How do I create a listing?
help.faq1A: Navigate to your Dashboard and click "Create Listing". Fill in the title, description, pricing, photos, and availability. Your listing will be reviewed before going live.
help.faq2A: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Renters pay at the time of booking. Owners receive payouts after the rental is completed and any dispute window has closed. A 15% platform fee is deducted from owner earnings, and a 5% service fee is added for renters.
help.faq3Q: What if an item is damaged during rental?
help.faq3A: If an item is returned damaged, the owner can file a dispute within the platform. If a security deposit was collected, it may be used to cover repair costs. Both parties can submit evidence, and our team will mediate if needed.
help.faq4Q: How do I cancel a booking?
help.faq4A: Go to your Bookings page, select the booking, and click Cancel. Refund amounts depend on the cancellation policy set by the owner. Cancellations made more than 48 hours before the start date typically receive a full refund.
help.faq5A: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption, secure payment processing through Stripe, and never store payment card details on our servers. See our Privacy Policy for details.
help.faq6Q: How do I verify my identity?
help.faq6A: Go to Settings > Profile and complete the verification steps. You may be asked to provide a government-issued ID and confirm your email and phone number. Verified accounts build more trust with other users.
help.supportTeamMessage: Our support team is here to assist you.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Help us build a more connected rental economy. We’re looking for passionate people who want to make it easy for anyone to rent anything.
careers.noOpeningsDesc: We don’t have any open positions at the moment, but we’re always interested in hearing from talented people. Send your resume and we’ll keep it on file.
careers.deptEngineeringDesc: Build the platform that powers peer-to-peer rentals at scale.
careers.deptDesignDesc: Create intuitive experiences that delight renters and owners.
careers.deptProductDesc: Shape the product roadmap and expand our marketplace.
careers.deptSupportDesc: Keep our community safe and help users succeed.

safety.subtitle: Your safety is our top priority
safety.description: Safety guidelines and best practices for renters and owners.

insurance.title: Insurance & Protection
insurance.subtitle: Rent with confidence. GharBatai offers multiple layers of protection for both renters and owners.
insurance.propertyProtectionDesc: Coverage for damage, loss, or theft of rented items during the rental period.
insurance.liabilityCoverageDesc: Protection against third-party claims arising from the use of rented items.
insurance.securityDepositsDesc: Owners can require refundable deposits held by the platform until the item is returned safely.
insurance.uploadInsuranceDocsDesc: Certain categories (vehicles, high-value items) require proof of insurance before your listing goes live. Upload your policy through the listing dashboard.
insurance.setSecurityDepositsDesc: Add a fixed or percentage-based deposit to your listing. Deposits are collected at booking and held until the item is returned in good condition.
insurance.damageClaimsDesc: If an item is returned damaged, file a dispute with photographic evidence. Our team will review and facilitate resolution.
insurance.securePaymentsDesc: All payments are processed securely through Stripe. Your payment details are never stored on our servers.
insurance.disputeResolutionDesc: If something goes wrong with your rental, file a dispute within 48 hours of the rental end date. Our team mediates between parties.
insurance.refundProtectionDesc: Cancellations made more than 48 hours before the start date are eligible for a full refund. Late cancellations follow the owner’s policy.
insurance.coverageQuestionDesc: Contact our support team for help with insurance requirements or claims.
insurance.reviewStep1: Your insurance policy will be reviewed by our team
insurance.reviewStep3: You’ll receive an email notification once verified
insurance.reviewStep4: Your listing will become active after insurance verification

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.description: Understand how cookies help us improve your rental experience.

becomeOwner.title: Become an Owner
becomeOwner.subtitle: Start earning by sharing your items
becomeOwner.alreadyOwnerDesc: You can start listing your items right away.
becomeOwner.heroSubtitle: Join thousands of owners earning money by renting out items they already own. It’s easy, safe, and profitable.
becomeOwner.benefitEarnDesc: Turn your idle items into a source of income. The average owner earns {{amount}}/month.
becomeOwner.benefitProtectedDesc: Our insurance coverage protects your items against damage during rentals.
becomeOwner.benefitCommunityDesc: All renters are verified with ID checks and reviews from previous owners.
becomeOwner.benefitFlexibleDesc: You control when your items are available. Block dates anytime.
becomeOwner.step1Desc: Add photos, description, and set your price for each item.
becomeOwner.step2Desc: Choose when your items can be rented and set booking preferences.
becomeOwner.step3Desc: Review requests and accept bookings that work for you.
becomeOwner.step4Desc: Receive payments directly to your bank account after each rental.
becomeOwner.readyToStartDesc: Become an owner today and start listing your items
becomeOwner.agreementItem1: I will accurately describe my items and their condition
becomeOwner.agreementItem2: I will respond to booking requests within 24 hours
becomeOwner.agreementItem3: I will maintain my items in good working condition
becomeOwner.agreementItem4: I understand the platform fee of 10% on successful rentals
becomeOwner.agreementItem5: I agree to the Terms of Service and Owner Guidelines
becomeOwner.agreementConsent: I have read and agree to the Owner Agreement, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.
becomeOwner.loginRequired: Please <loginLink>log in</loginLink> or <signupLink>create an account</signupLink> first to become an owner.
becomeOwner.faq1Q: How much does it cost to become an owner?
becomeOwner.faq1A: It’s completely free to become an owner and list your items. We only charge a 10% service fee when you make a successful rental.
becomeOwner.faq2Q: What if my item gets damaged?
becomeOwner.faq2A: All rentals are covered by our comprehensive insurance policy. If an item is damaged, you can file a claim and we’ll help resolve the issue.
becomeOwner.faq3A: Payments are automatically deposited to your connected bank account within 3-5 business days after each rental is completed.
becomeOwner.faq4Q: Can I choose who rents my items?
becomeOwner.faq4A: Yes! You can review renter profiles, ratings, and previous reviews before accepting or declining any booking request.

ownerGuide.title: Owner Guide
ownerGuide.subtitle: Everything you need to succeed as an owner
ownerGuide.description: Best practices for listing, pricing, and managing your rentals.
